function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: Invoice resend for 2026-03-23
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the invoice from 2026-03-23 here for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachment path was previously read and is exact; single attachment satisfies newest-first; recipient matches Claudia's canonical primary_contact_email; no quoted/forwarded source text was included. Possible minor schema omission: related_entities/related_projects were optional and not required. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file, which was already read and is eligible for deletion.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md for Claudia with the requested invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed successfully: bootstrap done, workflows/rules read, inbox email verified safe, recipient identity confirmed via canonical cast file, exact invoice file verified and attached, outbound draft written, inbox item deleted.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the invoice resend workflow.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing a draft reply to Claudia Reiter at her canonical email address with the requested 2026-03-23 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap order with root tree, root AGENTS.MD, and context. Read nested AGENTS.MD files on entering 99_system, workflows, 00_inbox, 10_entities/cast, 50_finance, 50_finance/invoices, 60_outbox, 60_outbox/channels, and 60_outbox/outbox. Used process-next-inbox-item.md, processing-inbox-email.md, and sending-email.md to verify sender identity, lane, recipient resolution, filename, and attachment rules. Deleted the inbox file only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_OK is supported by canonical evidence: the inbox email header in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested a resend for the 2026-03-23 Helios invoice; 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms claudia@helios-tax.example as Claudia Reiter's primary_contact_email, matching the sender; 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md is the exact requested invoice issued on 2026-03-23 to Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH; 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md confirms the client email lane. A draft outbound email was recorded with the exact invoice attachment path, and the processed inbox item was then deleted per workflow.
